jstats 0.9.82
  • Reference

Internal helper: format a regression equation for plot subtitles

dot-jst_format_equation.Rd

Builds a short equation string from a coefficient vector for use as a plot subtitle. Truncates to max_terms predictors and joins them with appropriate sign characters.

Usage

.jst_format_equation(coefs_vec, dv_name, max_terms = 3)

Arguments

coefs_vec

Named numeric vector of regression coefficients (intercept first).

dv_name

Character. The dependent variable name used at the left-hand side of the equation.

max_terms

Integer. Maximum number of predictor terms to include. Default 3; additional terms are summarized as ....

Value

A character string of the formatted equation.

On this page
